source: GA4 property 250338585 (last 7d: 2026-07-12..07-18, landingPage + sessionManualAdContent split) + Shopify live pull (net_sales EUR + orders, last 90d, by billing_country). Significance/verdict block carried from last Monday (2026-07-13); recomputed Mondays only.
note: A/B landing-page experiments. Refreshed daily by Polly (data); pause/promote verdicts on Mondays. UI reads top-level `experiments`; extra fields (aggregate_7d, real_sales_90d, built_not_yet_live) preserved for future UI surfaces.
polly_note: DATA-ONLY REFRESH (Sunday 2026-07-19). No pause/promote verdicts today — decision review: Mondays (TOMORROW). EN A/B this week: by page A 1.04% (16 txn / 1535 sess) vs B 0.98% (15 txn / 1526 sess); by ad-content lp_a 1.07% (19 txn) vs lp_b 0.96% (17 txn). A's mid-week lead has NARROWED back toward even over the weekend — the widening gap did not hold. This is why we wait for the significance math. Shopify 90d stable: US/UK/IT top 3 unchanged (IT 146 orders / €10,586). Tomorrow (Mon 2026-07-20) is the full significance recompute + verdict.

experiments.name: Big Box LP — Headline & Hero (EN)
experiments.hypothesis: Variant B (price-anchored CTA 'Get Your Box · From €39.95', single Big Box hero, prominent stats, scrolling reviews, FAQ) converts better than Variant A (carousel of 3 products, 'Choose Your Adventure' CTA).

experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Sun). By page this week A 1.04% (16 txn / 1535 sess) vs B 0.98% (15 txn / 1526 sess); by ad-content lp_a 1.07% (19 txn) vs lp_b 0.96% (17 txn). experiments.polly_note: DATA-ONLY (Sun), no verdict. Localized LP conv reads 0-5.88% in GA (DE-B's 5.88% is 1 txn on 17 sessions — pure small-sample noise) but Shopify shows IT/DE/FR/AU buying in real volume (IT 3rd-largest market: 146 orders / €10,586 in 90d). HOLD stance carried from last Monday — do not pause. Fix pending: wire GA4 through checkout so LP-level conv becomes true.
